app.title: KirokuMichi
offline.ai_unavailable: AI tutor unavailable — no internet connection
onboarding.welcome.title: Welcome to KirokuMichi
onboarding.welcome.subtitle: 記録道 — The Path of Records
onboarding.welcome.description: A structured Japanese learning app with adaptive flashcards, grammar practice, and an optional AI tutor.
onboarding.ai.title: AI Tutor (Optional)
onboarding.ai.description: Connect an AI provider for grammar explanations, conversation practice, and personalised feedback. You can skip this and add it later.
onboarding.prefs.title: Your Preferences
onboarding.hiragana.title: Hiragana Check
onboarding.hiragana.retry: Keep practising hiragana, then come back
onboarding.katakana.title: Katakana Check
onboarding.katakana.retry: We'll include katakana drills in your study plan
onboarding.placement.title: Placement Quiz
onboarding.placement.description: 15 quick questions to find the right starting level. Skip any you're unsure about.
onboarding.placement.result_description: Based on your answers, we recommend starting at {level}.
onboarding.goal.title: Set Your Goal
onboarding.goal.target_date: When do you want to take it?
onboarding.goal.feasibility_unrealistic: ✗ Very tight — consider a later date
onboarding.ime.title: Japanese Input
onboarding.ime.description: To type Japanese you'll need an IME (input method). Here's how to set it up on your device.
onboarding.ime.macos: macOS: System Settings → Keyboard → Input Sources → add Hiragana
onboarding.ime.windows: Windows: Settings → Time & Language → Language → add Japanese
onboarding.ime.ios: iOS: Settings → General → Keyboard → Keyboards → add Japanese
onboarding.ime.android: Android: Settings → General Management → Language → add Japanese keyboard
study.dashboard.title: Today's Review
study.dashboard.resume_body: You have an unfinished review session. Would you like to resume?
study.leech.title: Leech Detected
study.leech.body: This card has been failed {lapses} times.
study.summary.title: Session Complete
jlpt.title: JLPT Study
tutor.title: AI Tutor
tutor.subtitle: Ask about grammar, vocabulary, or sentence structure
tutor.offline: AI tutor unavailable — check your connection
tutor.starter.usage: When do I use に vs で?
correction.title: Sentence Correction
correction.subtitle: Type a Japanese sentence and get feedback
settings.ai_provider_hint: Choose: Anthropic, OpenAI, OpenRouter (100+ models), Ollama (local), or custom
settings.api_key_hint: Your API key for the selected provider. Never stored locally, always sent to server.
settings.api_endpoint_hint: For custom providers or self-hosted models. Must be OpenAI-compatible.
my_content.title: My Content
my_content.subtitle: Your custom cards, grammar, and quizzes
my_content.no_user_content: You haven't added any custom content yet
my_content.delete_confirm: Are you sure? This can't be undone.
generate.title: Generate Content
generate.subtitle: Describe what you want to create
generate.input_placeholder: e.g. 10 N2 grammar points about conditional forms
